title: Tumble Bunny
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Species |image=[[File:TumbleBunnies-HHoH.png]] |name=Tumble Bunny |designation= |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor=*[[Color/Legends|White]] {{C|face}}{{Ewoks|Horville's Hut of Horrors (episode)}} *Yellow *Blue *Pink |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=Three-[[Ear/Legends|eared]] |lifespan= |origin= |habitat= |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|The Tumble Bunnies are jumping for joy, 'cause you've come to see their show.|The Tumble Bunny trainer|}} '''Tumble Bunnies''' were three-eared [[Rabbit/Legends|rabbits]]. On the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]], Tumble Bunnies were taught by a [[Unidentified Tumble Bunny trainer|trainer]] to do tricks at a [[Bright Tree Fête|carnival]] to the delight of [[Youngling/Legends|young]] [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]]; as punishment for scaring those [[Wokling/Legends|woklings]], the Ewok [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Warrick]] had to perform several Tumble Bunny shows. ==Biology and appearance== Tumble Bunnies were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Rabbit/Legends|rabbit]]. They were three-[[Ear/Legends|eared]] and had [[Color/Legends|white]] [[Hair/Legends|fur]] on their faces, with yellow-, blue-, or pink-colored fur on the rest of their bodies. The rabbits had four [[Limb/Legends|legs]] and a tufted tail along with two [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], a [[Mouth/Legends|mouth]], and a [[Nose/Legends|nose]]. ==Behavior== {{Quote|Come on, guys. It'll be a great show.''"
"''Tumble Bunnies? Ugh!|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka and Teebo on the Tumble Bunnies' show|}} Tumble Bunnies on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]] were part of an attraction that was put on during a [[Bright Tree Fête|carnival]], where a [[Unidentified Tumble Bunny trainer|trainer]] had them do several tricks. The bunnies were able to jump through a small, raised hoop, and they became excited when an audience gathered for them. ==History== {{Quote|Let me guess. The Tumble Bunnies, right?|[[Latara/Legends|Latara]] to Wicket|}} [[File:WicketTumbleBunnies-HHoH.png|thumb|right|270px|Wicket and the Tumble Bunnies]] In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],{{EwoksDate|the appearance of Tumble Bunnies|[[Horville's Hut of Horrors (episode)|Horville's Hut of Horrors]]}} during an [[Standard year/Legends|annual]] carnival, the Tumble Bunny show was present, with their trainer wearing a costume that imitated the bunnies' tail and ears. An audience of Endor's [[Youngling/Legends|young]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]], the [[Wokling/Legends|woklings]], sat in attendance, laughing at the spectacle. One slightly older Ewok, [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Warrick]], was greatly bored by the show and convinced his friends [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]], [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]], and [[Latara/Legends|Latara]]—along with the woklings that they had been tasked with taking care of—to instead visit [[Horville's Hut of Horrors]], a local frightening attraction. All of the Ewoks were scared out of their wits, and once Warrick's [[Parent/Legends|mother]], [[Shodu Warrick]], got wind of what he had done, she punished him by having him take the place of the Tumble Bunny trainer; the young Ewok had to perform ten shows with the bunnies, which he found humiliating as a warrior. ==Behind the scenes== Tumble Bunnies appeared in "[[Horville's Hut of Horrors (episode)|Horville's Hut of Horrors]]," the sixteenth episode in the [[Ewoks: Season Two|second season]] of the animated television series [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']], which was written by [[Paul Dini]] and premiered on [[November 15]], [[1986]].{{InsiderCite|27|A Star Wars CELibration|A ''Star Wars'' CELibration}} ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Tumble Bunnies}} *{{Ewoks|Horville's Hut of Horrors (episode)}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Conejito acróbata }} [[Category:Creatures of unspecified diet]] [[Category:Mammals]] [[Category:Species of undefined sentience]]
